_comment: External MCP servers. Hikari delegates to specialist subagents (drive_gmail, notion, research) that own these servers. The bridge logs warnings at startup if required env vars are missing.

google_workspace._comment: Upstream entrypoint is broken (calls asyncio.run on a sync FastMCP.run). Bypass it by importing the module (which registers tools) then calling mcp.run() directly. Also: package name is google-workspace-mcp but no top-level executable matches — must use --from + python -c.
